name: ErrorDialog
summary: The ErrorDialog class represents the common error dialog for the Open API.

methods.name: Show(Exception, ErrorDialog.Severity)
methods.signature: public static void Show(Exception Ex, ErrorDialog.Severity Severity)

params.name: Ex
params.doc: The exception to display in the dialog.

throws.when: Thrown when the Ex parameter is null.

methods.name: Show(String, List<String>, ErrorDialog.Severity)
methods.signature: public static void Show(string Message, List<string> Details, ErrorDialog.Severity Severity)

params.name: Message
params.doc: The message to display in the dialog.

params.name: Details
params.doc: The details to display in the dialog.

throws.when: Thrown when the Message parameter is null.

methods.name: Show(String, String, ErrorDialog.Severity)
methods.signature: public static void Show(string Message, string Details, ErrorDialog.Severity Severity)

params.name: Message
params.doc: The message to display in the dialog.

params.name: Details
params.doc: The details to display in the dialog.
